name: The Great Bridge
description: A grand stone bridge spanning the river gorge, complete with lantern posts and vine detailing.

name: Mushroom Manor
description: A cozy cottage built inside and around a giant red mushroom. Features a rooftop garden.

name: The Watchtower
description: A tall medieval watchtower on the hilltop, with a beacon fire that can be seen from spawn.

name: Undersea Dome
description: A glass dome built on the ocean floor, housing a small underwater farm and aquarium.

name: The Nether Highway
description: An ice-road highway through the Nether connecting all major portals. Fast travel for everyone.

name: Flower Valley
description: A sprawling garden in a valley, with every type of flower arranged in color-gradient rows.

name: Castle Beansworth
description: The server's largest build — a full medieval castle with throne room, dungeon, and working drawbridge.
